project.title: LBJ Lessons from This Is Democracy Podcast
project.description: This is a curated collection of episodes from the podcast This Is Democracy that focus on the various aspects of Lyndon Baines Johnson's presidency and American history in the 1960s. The project also includes lesson plans for high school history courses focused on LBJ's presidency and the history of the United States in the mid-20th century.
project.creator: raymondhyser
